title: tiquilia paronychioides
intro: Tiquilia paronychioides, also known as Idaho purslane, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tiquilia paronychioides include reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or poultice, and is often used topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
